texts.label: text
texts.orig: SINGLE(1PAX), DOUBLE/TWIN (2PAX), TRIPLE(one large bed+small bed for max 3pax), COTTAGE(2 large beds+4small beds for max 8pax), SAFARI HOUSE 1BR (one large bed for max 2pax), SAFARI HOUSE 5BR (5rooms with large beds for max 10pax).
texts.text: SINGLE(1PAX), DOUBLE/TWIN (2PAX), TRIPLE(one large bed+small bed for max 3pax), COTTAGE(2 large beds+4small beds for max 8pax), SAFARI HOUSE 1BR (one large bed for max 2pax), SAFARI HOUSE 5BR (5rooms with large beds for max 10pax).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Confirmed booking cancelled before 60 days of confirmation retention will not be charged.
texts.text:  Confirmed booking cancelled before 60 days of confirmation retention will not be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Confirmed booking cancelled between 15-60 days to arrival day, a one night's rate will be charged.
texts.text:  Confirmed booking cancelled between 15-60 days to arrival day, a one night's rate will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Confirmed booking cancelled in less than two weeks to arrival day, a 100% of entire booking will be charged.
texts.text:  Confirmed booking cancelled in less than two weeks to arrival day, a 100% of entire booking will be charged.
